title: Maple's Chicken Collection
description: Seasonal chicken variants with custom textures that change with the seasons! 🐥
body:
Add Some Chicken Charm to Your Minecraft World🐥

Custom designed chicken textures to bring a little something extra to your gameplay.


The textures change automatically with the seasons! (can be turned off)
 

🌱 The Sapling mod needs to be installed in order for this mod to work 🌱

 

 ⚙️This mod needs to be installed on both the client and the server so you can see the same textures as your friends 🤗


 

 

The chicken variations spawn randomly across the world. 

The chickens stay in their own skin when re-opening a world, collect 'm all! 🤗

🌸☀️🍂❄️

The textures will automatically change per season. There will also still be regular chickens.

 

The season dates: day - month

🌸Spring:  01-03 / 31-05         ☀️Summer: 01-06 / 31-08 
🍂Autumn:  01-09 / 30-11          ❄️Winter:  01-12 / 28-02          

 

There is also an added command for which hemisphere you prefer! Northern or Southern 😊
(Northern is selected automatically)


‼️🏷️If you want to keep a certain chicken texture on a specific chicken for the whole year make sure to give them a name tag before the new season starts! Otherwise, they will change. ‼️🏷️

 

Commands
⚙️To customize your experience.

 

Admin Tools
/maplemods chicken adminTools flipSeasonDatesToOtherHemisphere   | To change the hemisphere
/maplemods chicken adminTools restAllLoadedEntityTextures   |  To reset the chickens that are already loaded in the game
/maplemods chicken adminTools reloadConfigFile  | To reload changes in the Config

 

Config Values
/maplemods chicken setConfigValues showCurrentValues
/maplemods chicken setConfigValues disableSeasonsDuringHoliday (false/true)  | Option to disable the mixture of the holidays and the seasonal textures.
/maplemods chicken setConfigValues nameTagPreventsTexture (false/true)  | Option to save the texture with the name tag or to disable it.
/maplemods chicken setConfigValues replaceSeasonalTextures  | To reload the textures after making a change.

 

Update Category Settings
/maplemods chicken updateCategorySettings _default   | Disable or enable the original chicken texture
/maplemods chicken updateCategorySettings <category> (disable/enable/setDate)  | Customize the seasons

 

Update Texture Settings
/maplemods chicken updateTextureSettings <texture> (disable/enable) | To specifically choose which textures to enable or disable

 

 

Very excited to finally design and launch my custom chicken.

✨ Hope you enjoy seeing them wander around as much as I enjoyed creating them ✨

 

The seasonal textures are also available with the bee mobs! 🐝
Working on other themes and mobs soon!
